summary: Figure AI Inc.’s humanoid robots sorted packages for around 50 hours nonstop without intervention, Chief Executive Officer Brett Adcock said, a milestone in showing their ability to take on everyday tasks.

summary: The Mandalorian and Grogu, the first new Star Wars film in seven years, will test whether Disney+ TV series can translate to the big screen.

title: Will the UK Feel the Burnham?
title_cn: 英国会感受到伯纳姆的影响吗？
summary: The bond markets are worried about Andy Burnham’s spending plans if he becomes prime minister. Can he reassure them? And does he even want to?

title: Norse Atlantic Prepares to Start Sale Process as Costs Rise
title_cn: 随着成本上升，挪威大西洋航空公司准备启动出售流程
summary: Norse Atlantic ASA has brought on JPMorgan Chase & Co. to run a sale process set to kick off in the coming months, people familiar with the matter said, as the Norwegian budget airline struggles with high costs and dwindling cash reserves.

title_cn: 特朗普离开中国，但能源瓶颈尚未解决
summary: Get caught up.

title_cn: 谢因鲍姆任命墨西哥国家石油公司首席财务官来管理这家负债累累的墨西哥石油巨头
summary: Petroleos Mexicanos Chief Executive Officer Víctor Rodríguez Padilla is stepping down, handing the reins to a financial expert with close ties to the president as Mexico’s oil company grapples with a heavy debt load.

title: China Confirms Xi Visit, Trump: Taiwan Can't 'Go Independent'
title_cn: 中国确认习近平访问，特朗普：台湾不能“独立”
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: Dollar Notches Best Week Since Early March on Fed Hike View
title_cn: 美联储加息观点推动美元创三月初以来最佳单周表现
summary: The dollar finished its best week in over two months after US data showed price pressures that could push the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates over the next year.

title: The Global Bond Rout Catches Up With Wall Street’s Risk Rally
title_cn: 全球债券溃败赶上了华尔街的风险反弹
summary: Wall Street’s hard-charging risk rally just ran into the bond market.

title: Traders Dump Chipmakers as Rising Yields Drive US Stock Selloff
title_cn: 由于收益率上升推动美国股市抛售，交易商纷纷抛售芯片制造商
summary: Wall Street offloaded semiconductor companies and other high-flying technology shares Friday following a weeks-long, record-setting rally as rising bond yields curbed investors’ appetite for risky bets.

title: Global Bond Selloff Worsens as Rising Oil Prices Spook Investors
title_cn: 油价上涨令投资者恐慌，全球债券抛售加剧
summary: Government bond markets tumbled around the world, sending yields surging from Japan to the US on intensifying fears that the war-driven price shock will force central banks to raise interest rates to contain the impact.

title: Argentina’s YPF Seeks Incentives for $25 Billion Oil Project
title_cn: 阿根廷YPF寻求250亿美元石油项目的激励
summary: State-run Argentine energy giant YPF SA announced a $25 billion project to accelerate oil production in the country, marking the largest investment since President Javier Milei took office.

title: Alberta Premier Smith on New Pipeline Proposal
title_cn: 艾伯塔省省长史密斯谈新管道提案
summary: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith discusses plans for a new pipeline to the west coast of Canada and expects Asian firms will invest. She speaks with Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ford Falls Most in 15 Months After AI-Driven Rally Abates
title_cn: 人工智能驱动的涨势减弱后，福特股价跌幅为 15 个月来最大
summary: Ford Motor Co.’s blistering rally screeched to a halt Friday, as a broader market selloff cooled enthusiasm over the automaker’s potential to benefit from the boom in energy demand for artificial intelligence.

title: Stocks Post Worst Day Since March as Bonds Get Hit: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 由于债券受到打击，股市经历了三月份以来最糟糕的一天：市场总结
summary: A selloff in global bonds halted a rally in stocks, with concern intensifying that central banks will be forced to tighten policy to keep inflation in check amid persistently elevated oil prices

title: Meet The 26-Year-Old Undercutting BlackRock and Goldman ETFs
title_cn: 来认识一下已有 26 年历史的贝莱德和高盛 ETF
summary: Corgi is barking about buffers

title: GIC, Itausa Lead $1 Billion Injection in Aegea, Diluting Equipav
title_cn: GIC 和 Itausa 牵头向 Aegea 注资 10 亿美元，稀释 Equipav
summary: Aegea will receive as much as $1 billion in fresh capital from shareholders, led by Singapore sovereign wealth fund GIC Pte and Itaúsa SA, as it prepares a potential bid for Minas Gerais’ state-owned utility Copasa, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: US Needs Another Decade to Fix $1.2 Trillion Rare Earth Crisis
title_cn: 美国还需要十年来解决价值 1.2 万亿美元的稀土危机
summary: Rare earths are the backbone of modern tech, and China has cornered the global market for them. As it uses that dominance as geopolitical leverage, can other countries break its grip? Joe Deaux, Bloomberg News Corporate and Economic Statecraft Reporter joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss why global powers are racing to secure rare earths.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wall Street Prices Out Rate Cuts, Eyes Hikes, Global Bond Selloff Deepens | Real Yield 5/15/2026
title_cn: 华尔街价格不及降息，目光加息，全球债券抛售加剧实际收益率 2026 年 5 月 15 日
summary: "Bloomberg Real Yield" highlights the market-moving news you need to know. Today's guests: Columbia Threadneedle Portfolio Manager, Total Return Bond Ed Al-Hussainy, JPMorgan Management CIO of US GFICC Kay Herr, CreditSights Global Head of Credit Strategy Winnie Cisar, and Ironsides Macroeconomics Director of Research Barry Knapp. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Turkey’s Kontrolmatik Defaults on 450 Million Liras Debt
title_cn: 土耳其 Kontrolmatik 4.5 亿里拉债务违约
summary: Turkey’s Kontrolmatik Enerji ve Muhendislik defaulted on two separate lira bonds that matured on Friday, according to a statement by Turkey’s Central Securities Depository, marking a rare corporate debt default in the country’s local bond market.

title: Consumers Feel Affordability Crunch Heading Into Summer
title_cn: 进入夏季，消费者感到负担能力紧张
summary: Blake Leonard, Stew Leonard’s Wines & Spirits President joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss  summer trends, the outlook for the consumer and what is selling and expected to sell. Blake also shares on if Stew Leonard has ever thought about going public.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Morgan Stanley Sees $200 Billion in Hedging Boosting Euro
title_cn: 摩根士丹利预计将投入 2000 亿美元对冲提振欧元
summary: The euro could climb to levels last seen five years ago as a drop in hedging costs would drive flows of more than $200 billion and prop up the currency, according to Morgan Stanley.

title: Oil Rises as Trump Departs China With Limited Progress on Hormuz
title_cn: 特朗普离开中国，霍尔木兹海峡进展有限，油价上涨
summary: Oil climbed as US President Donald Trump left a meeting with Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping without any meaningful progress on increasing energy flows through the Strait of Hormuz, reigniting concerns that disruptions to global supplies will deepen.

title: Bond Vigilantes Are Back: JPMorgan's Kay Herr
title_cn: 债券义务警员回来了：摩根大通的凯·赫尔
summary: Kay Herr, chief investment officer of US GFICC at JPMorgan Asset Management, and Ed Al-Hussainy, portfolio manager at Columbia Threadneedle Investments, join Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Government bond markets tumbled around the world, sending yields surging from Japan to the US. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Metals From Copper to Gold Slump as Inflation Fears Roil Markets
title_cn: 由于通胀担忧扰乱市场，从铜到黄金的金属价格暴跌
summary: Metals from gold to copper sank in a broad selloff in financial markets amid investor concerns that a war-driven surge in inflation may force global central banks to raise borrowing costs and drag down economic growth.

title: Yield-Hungry Investors Bet on Credit as Government Debt Sours
title_cn: 随着政府债务恶化，渴望收益的投资者押注信贷
summary: Credit investors enticed by high yields are buying up corporate bonds, shrugging off the lingering Middle East conflict and focusing instead on robust results from blue-chip businesses.

title: New York Plans Tax on Homes Over $1 Million Purchased With Cash
title_cn: 纽约计划对现金购买超过 100 万美元的房屋征税
summary: Bloomberg's Laura Nahmias joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield."  New York lawmakers are planning a new tax on New York City homes purchased in cash for at least $1 million, according to people familiar with the state budget negotiations. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Might Be A Lid on Spread Widening: CreditSights Cisar
title_cn: CreditSights Cisar 可能会限制利差扩大
summary: Winnie Cisar, global head of credit strategy at CreditSights, and Barry Knapp, director of research at Ironsides Macroeconomics and chief market strategist at Ironsides MRA, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Credit investors enticed by high yields are buying up corporate bonds, shrugging off the lingering Middle East conflict and focusing instead on robust results from blue-chip businesses. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kraken Cuts 150 Workers After Deploying AI; IPO May Slip to 2027
title_cn: Kraken 部署 AI 后裁员 150 人； IPO 可能推迟至 2027 年
summary: Kraken, one of the world’s oldest cryptocurrency exchanges, has cut some staff to reduce costs and may not go public as soon as initially expected due to a sharp decline in digital-asset prices, according to a person familiar with the matter.

title: Venezuela Kickstarts $170B Debt Restructuring Process
title_cn: 委内瑞拉启动 170B 美元债务重组进程
summary: Bloomberg's Maria Elena Vizcaino joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Venezuela hired a financial adviser as it launches one of the world’s largest-ever debt restructurings, aiming to rework an estimated $170 billion of defaulted bonds and loans.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Global Bond Selloff Deepens, US 30-Year Hits '07 High
title_cn: 全球债券抛售加剧，美国 30 年期国债创 07 年新高
summary: Kay Herr, chief investment officer of US GFICC at JPMorgan Asset Management, and Ed Al-Hussainy, portfolio manager at Columbia Threadneedle Investments,  join Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Government bond markets tumbled around the world, sending yields surging from Japan to the US. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JPMorgan Private Credit Trading Ramps Up
title_cn: 摩根大通私人信贷交易量增加
summary: Bloomberg's Katherine Chiglinsky joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." JPMorgan Chase trading effort in the $1.8 trillion private-credit market is building momentum after years of sluggish growth. The biggest US bank has traded roughly $2 billion of private-credit loans this year, more than in all previous years combined. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Oil Flows Most Likely Cut by Spill, TankerTrackers Says
title_cn: TankerTrackers 称伊朗石油流量最有可能因泄漏而减少
summary: A pause in Iranian oil shipments from Kharg Island, the nation’s main export hub, is most likely the result of an oil spill in the area, according to TankerTrackers.com, a firm that uses satellite imagery to monitor vessel movements.

title: Curious Yen Spikes Have Traders Gaming Japan ‘Warning Shots’
title_cn: 好奇的日元飙升让交易员对日本发出“警告”
summary: Every few trading sessions, the yen jolts higher against the dollar, and then it suddenly drops.

title: Mexico’s Uber Crackdown at Airports to Complicate Plans for World Cup Visitors
title_cn: 墨西哥对机场的优步打击使世界杯游客的计划变得复杂
summary: Mexico is cracking down on the use of ride-hailing apps like Uber and Didi at the nation’s airports, causing headaches for travelers as it prepares to host the World Cup next month.

title: China Can 'No Longer Be Stopped'
title_cn: 中国“无法再被阻止”
summary: The US lacks a strategy to manage China's return as a great power, former UN Security Council president Kishore Mahbubani tells Mishal Husain. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Chip Sector Needs More Talent, Says SEMI
title_cn: SEMI表示美国芯片行业需要更多人才
summary: President Trump says he discussed guardrails on AI and Nvidia's H200 chips with Chinese leader Xi Jinping during a two-day summit in Beijing. Shari Liss, vice president of global workforce development and initiatives at SEMI, joins Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss what this means for the US semiconductor sector. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Is Starting to See Heavy Job Losses in Roles Exposed to AI
title_cn: 美国开始看到接触人工智能的岗位大量失业
summary: Several US occupations expected to be impacted by artificial intelligence saw heavy job losses for a second year in 2025, led by customer service representatives and certain types of secretaries and salespeople.

title: Cerebras CEO Is Worth $3.2 Billion After Year’s Largest IPO
title_cn: Cerebras 首席执行官在完成年度最大 IPO 后身价 32 亿美元
summary:
Shares of Cerebras Systems Inc. soared about 68% in Nasdaq trading in New York. It’s the year’s biggest initial public offering and gives the company a market value of roughly $67 billion. 
Bailey Lipschultz, Bloomberg News Senior Equities Reporter, discusses the initial offering and how the company is differentiating itself from incumbents like Nvidia. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fermi Alters Rules to Foil Ex-CEO Push to Remake Board
title_cn: 费米改变规则以挫败前首席执行官重组董事会的努力
summary: US power-plant developer Fermi Inc. changed its rules around director appointments to block efforts by its former chief executive officer to reshape the company’s board.

title: Ackman Takes Microsoft Stake, Calls Tech ‘Deeply Embedded’
title_cn: 阿克曼入股微软，称科技“深度嵌入”
summary: Bill Ackman said Pershing Square has built a new stake in Microsoft Corp., taking advantage of a decline in the company’s share price to invest in a business that he said is stronger and more resilient than investors think.

title: Apple-OpenAI Alliance Frays
title_cn: 苹果与 OpenAI 联盟的争执
summary:
Apple Inc.’s two-year-old partnership with OpenAI has become strained, according to people familiar with the matter, with the AI startup failing to see the expected benefits from the deal and now preparing possible legal action. 
Anurag Rana, Bloomberg Intelligence Technology Analyst, joins to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MiniMed Aims to Be 'Self-Driving Car' of Diabetes Care
title_cn: MiniMed 旨在成为糖尿病护理的“自动驾驶汽车”
summary: Diabetes equipment provider MiniMed is aiming to be the “self-driving car” of insulin pumps, says its CEO, Que Dallara. Hot off the heels of the company’s IPO, Dallara speaks with Caroline Hyde on the sidelines of the Consello Spark Summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Delivery Hero Shares Cap Best Week Ever as Breakup Odds Rise
title_cn: 随着分手几率上升，送货英雄分享了有史以来最好的一周
summary: Signs that Delivery Hero SE may be preparing to sell more assets have powered the beaten-down stock to the best week since its 2017 listing.

title: Inside Paul Tudor Jones’ Sports AI Startup
title_cn: 保罗·都铎·琼斯 (Paul Tudor Jones) 的体育人工智能初创公司内部
summary: SumerSports, a startup founded by Paul Tudor Jones, is trying to transform football using artificial intelligence. SūmerSports CEO Lorrissa Horton joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain how NFL teams are using frame-by-frame AI tracking for scouting, player development, predictive play analysis, and fan engagement. It's all powered by hedge-fund style analytics that was originally inspired by fantasy football. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Revolut Offers All Staffers £1000 to Help Lure In New Business
title_cn: Revolut 向所有员工提供 1000 英镑以帮助吸引新业务
summary: Revolut Ltd. Chief Executive Officer Nik Storonsky is offering employees across the digital bank £1000 ($1,334) to woo more businesses to bank with Revolut, setting it as its highest priority to further boost the digital lender’s growth, valuation and revenue.

title: UnitedHealth Tracks Workers’ AI Use in Push to Transform Company
title_cn: UnitedHealth 追踪员工在推动公司转型过程中使用人工智能的情况
summary: UnitedHealth Group Inc. is tracking how often some employees use artificial intelligence tools as part of a push to embed the technology throughout its operations, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Hackers Armed With AI Stoke Fears for $130 Billion Crypto Sector
title_cn: 配备人工智能的黑客引发了对 1300 亿美元加密货币行业的恐惧
summary: The crypto hacks came a little over two weeks apart in April, netting the attackers almost $600 million in total while triggering an investor exodus from one major platform and causing another to fail.

title: Cerebras Pulls Back After IPO Day; Gemini Space Station Rises on $100M Investment | Stock Movers
title_cn: Cerebras 在 IPO 日后撤资；双子座空间站投资 1 亿美元崛起 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Gemini Space Station (GEMI) is rising after Tyler and Cameron Winklevoss made a $100 million “strategic investment” into the company. CEO Tyler Winklevoss said the investment will help fuel the company's ambition to evolve from a crypto company into a markets company.
- Magnum Ice Cream (MICC) shares are jumped as much as 22%, the most since the stock’s December listing, after Reuters reported that private equity firms including Blackstone and Clayton Dubilier & Rice are exploring potential bids for the company.
- Cerebras Systems (CBRS) shares pulled back after a huge IPO day yesterday. The shares jumped 68% in its trading debut after raising $5.5 billion in the year’s largest IPO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI, Robotics Key to Transforming Health Care: BD CEO
title_cn: BD 首席执行官：人工智能、机器人技术是医疗保健转型的关键
summary: Tom Polen, CEO of medical technology company BD, says that in the next decade AI and robotics will transform health care in ways that will make today’s system seem archaic. Polen sits down with Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde on the sidelines of the Consello Spark Summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SambaNova Challenges Cerebras Strategy
title_cn: SambaNova 挑战 Cerebras 战略
summary: SambaNova CEO Rodrigo Liang joined Bloomberg  Open Interest to explain why the next AI war won’t be about training models, but rather it will be about  inference costs, compute shortages, and who can scale AI infrastructure profitably. In a direct contrast with Cerebras after its blockbuster IPO, Liang breaks down the coming AI supply crunch, exploding enterprise demand, and why inference could become the biggest business in tech. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Uber Rival Bolt, China’s Dongfeng Reach South Africa EV Deal
title_cn: Uber 竞争对手 Bolt、中国东风 Reach 南非电动汽车交易
summary: Bolt Technology OU agreed a deal with China’s Dongfeng Motor Group Co. to roll out an electric-vehicle fleet in South Africa that Yugo Rides will manage.

title: Everyday People Are Hurting. Why Are AI and Markets Still Booming?
title_cn: 每天人们都在受伤。为什么人工智能和市场仍然蓬勃发展？
summary:
As the Strait of Hormuz closure continues, the global energy crisis deepens, while inflation continues to rise and US consumer sentiment remains low. Why then, given all of this worrying news, is the stock market breaking records as tech companies continue to expand AI?

On this episode of the Everybody's Business podcast, we are joined by Kyla Scanlon, author of In This Economy? How Money & Markets Really Work. She tells Max Chafkin and Stacey Vanek Smith about the disconnect happening between Wall Street and main street and what could happen if and when there is an AI crash. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Big Tech, Chips Will Push Nasdaq to 30,000, Ives Says
title_cn: 艾夫斯表示，大型科技公司、芯片公司将推动纳斯达克指数升至 30,000 点
summary: Dan Ives of Wedbush Securities says the Cerebras Systems IPO is a watershed moment for the tech sector. He sees the Nasdaq hitting 30,000 in the next six to nine months. He has more on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Premarket Movers for May 15, 2026
title_cn: 2026 年 5 月 15 日美国盘前走势
summary: S&P 500 Index futures fall 1% as of 7:48 a.m. in New York amid a broad global selloff in bonds.

title: Samsung Executives Make Rare Union Visit as Strike Fears Mount
title_cn: 随着罢工担忧加剧，三星高管罕见访问工会
summary: Samsung Electronics Co.’s top management made a rare visit to leaders of the company’s largest labor union late Friday in an effort to revive stalled wage negotiations after government-mediated talks collapsed earlier this week.

title: Trump Says He Discussed AI Guardrails, Nvidia’s Chips With Xi
title_cn: 特朗普称他与习近平讨论了人工智能护栏、英伟达芯片
summary: US President Donald Trump said he discussed guardrails on artificial intelligence with Chinese leader Xi Jinping, while adding that Nvidia Corp.’s H200 chips also came up during a two-day summit in Beijing.

title: Disney Digs In Against Pressure From Trump’s FCC
title_cn: 迪士尼顶住特朗普领导下的联邦通信委员会的压力
summary: The company is supporting ABC in a more spirited way than it did last year

title: India Moves to Buffer Economy Against Iran War Fallout
title_cn: 印度采取措施缓冲经济以应对伊朗战争的影响
summary: India’s government ramped up steps to curb foreign outflows and cushion the economy from the fallout of the Iran war.

title: UK Fund Seeks Removal of Two Executives at Japan’s Wacom
title_cn: 英国基金寻求解雇日本 Wacom 的两名高管
summary: A UK investment fund is urging shareholders of pen tablet maker Wacom Co. to remove two top executives over the Japanese company’s weak performance and unsuccessful management moves.

title: Hana Invests $670 Million in Crypto Exchange Operator Dunamu
title_cn: Hana 向加密货币交易所运营商 Dunamu 投资 6.7 亿美元
summary: Hana Bank, one of South Korea’s largest commercial lenders, has acquired a 1 trillion won ($670 million) stake in crypto exchange operator Dunamu, in the latest sign that the country’s banks are ready to embrace digital assets.

title: Technoprobe Shares Surge by a Record After Raising Guidance
title_cn: 提高指引后 Technoprobe 股价飙升创纪录
summary: Technoprobe SpA rose by a record amount after the Italian company  raised its guidance and said demand is surging for its semiconductor testing equipment.

title: Schneider Electric Chair on Geopolitics, AI, Africa’s Growth
title_cn: 施耐德电气地缘政治、人工智能和非洲增长主席
summary: Schneider Electric Chairman Jean-Pascal Tricoire discusses how geopolitical tensions are reshaping global energy production, the growth potential across the African continent, and the role of energy efficiency and AI in powering the continent’s future. He speaks with Bloomberg TV's Jennifer Zabasajja at the Africa CEO Forum in Kigali. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kioxia Preps US Listing After Riding AI Boom to Big Profit
title_cn: 铠侠在人工智能热潮中获得巨额利润后准备在美国上市
summary: Kioxia Holdings Corp., the world’s best-performing major stock this year, said it would list its shares in the US as it reaps the benefits of a global memory chip shortage that’s ratcheted up prices of the vital component.

title: STT Global Data Centres Is Said to Plan $500 Million India IPO
title_cn: 据称 STT 全球数据中心计划在印度进行 5 亿美元的首次公开募股
summary: STT Global Data Centres India Pvt. is considering an initial public offering in Mumbai that could raise as much as $500 million, according to people familiar with the matter, as investor demand for digital infrastructure accelerates.

title: US Farmers Hoping the Trump-Xi Summit Will Lift Sagging Fortunes
title_cn: 美国农民希望特习峰会能够提振萎靡不振的财富
summary: The agriculture industry has been hit by higher costs, declining exports

title: Trump Administration Aims to Speed Oil Permitting in Alaska
title_cn: 特朗普政府旨在加快阿拉斯加的石油许可
summary: The Trump administration plans to streamline the permitting process for oil developments inside the National Petroleum Reserve-Alaska as it pushes to accelerate crude production in the US Arctic.

title: Iran-Linked Militant Plotted Attacks in US, Europe, DOJ Says
title_cn: 美国司法部称，与伊朗有关的武装分子策划在美国和欧洲发动袭击
summary: The US charged an Iraqi national with participating in terrorist attacks against US targets, including a planned synagogue bombing in New York and the European offices of two American banks.

title: Border Arrests Rise for Third Straight Month to Most Under Trump
title_cn: 特朗普治下边境逮捕人数连续第三个月上升至最多
summary: Migrant arrests at the US-Mexico border edged up to the most in President Donald Trump’s second term after plunging when he returned to office in January 2025.

title: Trump’s More Than 3,700 Trades Astonish Wall Street Insiders
title_cn: 特朗普的 3,700 多笔交易令华尔街业内人士震惊
summary: President Donald Trump’s latest financial disclosures show that he or his investment advisers made more than 3,700 trades in the first quarter, a flurry totaling tens of millions of dollars and involving major companies that have dealings with his administration.

title: Trump, Xi Project Hormuz Alignment Despite No Iran Progress
title_cn: 尽管伊朗问题没有取得进展，特朗普和习近平仍计划霍尔木兹结盟
summary: China called for a rapid reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, a goal it shares with the US, though there was no sign of a breakthrough between the superpowers on how to achieve that after President Donald Trump’s trip to Beijing.

title: FDA Revamp Begins With the Departure of a Marty Makary Ally
title_cn: FDA 改革从 Marty Makary 盟友的离开开始
summary: A key ally of former Food and Drug Administration commissioner Marty Makary is departing the agency, according to people familiar with the matter. It’s expected to be the first in a series of changes the Trump administration will make to create a clean slate at the agency.

title: Trump Wraps Up China Trip | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/15/2026
title_cn: 特朗普结束中国之行|权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 5 月 15 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the conclusion of President Trump's trip to China. On today's show, Republican Congressman Vince Fong, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Third Way Executive Vice President Jim Kessler and former Fed Vice Chair Lael Brainard. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rio de Janeiro Fuel Fraud Probe Sweeps Up Head of Refining Group
title_cn: 里约热内卢炼油集团负责人遭燃油欺诈调查
summary: Brazil’s top court ordered the arrest of the head of a private refining group in the latest effort to crack down on organized crime infiltrating in the formal economy.

title: Israel, Lebanon Extend Ceasefire 45 Days After Washington Talks
title_cn: 华盛顿会谈后以色列和黎巴嫩延长停火 45 天
summary: Israel and Lebanon agreed to extend a ceasefire for 45 days to allow for more talks, the US State Department said on Friday, as the Trump administration tries to tamp down a conflict that’s made ending the war against Iran more difficult.

title: China Allows Exports for 425 US Beef Plants, Trade Group Says
title_cn: 贸易组织称中国允许 425 家美国牛肉工厂出口
summary: China has renewed export licenses for 425 US beef plants, making way for a full resumption of trade for the protein between the two countries, according to the US Meat Export Federation.

title: Fed Faces Regime Change as Powell's Steps Down as Chair
title_cn: 鲍威尔辞去主席职务，美联储面临政权更迭
summary: Today marks the end of Jerome Powell's term as Fed Chair. His tenure will be defined by the pandemic and his response to the inflation surge that followed. Lael Brainard, Former Director of the National Economic Council During the Biden Administration, Former Vice Chair of the Federal Reserve, Distinguished Fellow at the Georgetown Psaros Center for Financial Markets and Policy joins to discuss the future of the Fed and Kevin Warsh's Chairmanship.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mexico Blocks Bank Accounts of Governor Facing US Drug Charges
title_cn: 墨西哥冻结面临美国毒品指控的州长的银行账户
summary: Mexican financial authorities blocked the bank accounts of the governor of Sinaloa state and nine other current and former officials who are facing US charges that they aided drug traffickers.

title: How Keir Starmer Imploded and Plunged Britain Into More Chaos
title_cn: 凯尔·斯塔默如何让英国内爆并陷入更多混乱
summary: Investors are bracing for a period of instability as a protracted Labour party leadership contest looms

title: Russia Orders Euroclear to Pay €200 Billion to Central Bank
title_cn: 俄罗斯命令 Euroclear 向央行支付 2000 亿欧元
summary: A Russian court ordered the Euroclear Ltd. clearinghouse to pay €200 billion ($233 billion) to the nation’s central bank, according to the Interfax news service, in a suit related to the European Union’s freeze of Russian assets.

title: The Labour Contenders Who Could Replace Starmer
title_cn: 谁可以取代斯塔默的工党竞争者
summary:
These are the Labour contenders who could unseat UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer.

Alex Morgan explains what they might mean for markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says He Didn't Ask Xi For Any Favors on Iran
title_cn: 特朗普称他没有要求习近平在伊朗问题上提供任何帮助
summary: President Donald Trump says didn't ask Xi Jinping for any favors when it comes to Iran. He says Xi largely agrees with him on the risks of Iran becoming a nuclear power. But Trump says he didn't ask the Chinese leader to put any pressure on Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Crypto’s Win on Landmark Legislation Reshapes Rivalry With Banks
title_cn: 加密货币在具有里程碑意义的立法上的胜利重塑了与银行的竞争
summary: For years, big banks worked to keep crypto out of mainstream finance, citing everything from money laundering and fraud to stability risks, and arguing the industry could not enjoy bank-like privileges without bank-equivalent oversight.

title: Los capitalistas de Cuba podrían ser la solución para la isla tras escasez de petróleo
title_cn: 古巴资本家可能是石油短缺后该岛的解决方案
summary: Las empresas privadas que surgieron en la isla a pesar de años de persecución serán fundamentales para lo que venga, ahora que Trump presiona para poner fin a 67 años de régimen unipartidista.

title: Gilts Slump in Anticipation of Burnham Challenge to Starmer
title_cn: 由于伯纳姆对斯塔默的挑战，后备母猪价格暴跌
summary: UK government bonds tumbled after Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham secured a pathway to potentially challenge Keir Starmer as prime minister, threatening political instability that investors fear could result in more expansive fiscal policy.

title: Eurasia Sees Rising Odds of Right-Wing Surprise in Brazil Vote
title_cn: 欧亚大陆认为右翼对巴西投票感到意外的可能性正在上升
summary: Analysts are underestimating the chances that a right-wing candidate other than Senator Flavio Bolsonaro reaches Brazil’s runoff election against President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva, according to Eurasia Group.

title: Hyundai’s Top US Lobbyist to Depart After One Year in Key Role
title_cn: 现代汽车美国高级游说者在担任关键角色一年后离职
summary: Hyundai Motor Group’s top US lobbyist is leaving his role after a year on the job, a significant departure as the automaker contends with punishing tariffs and unpredictable policy swings under President Donald Trump.

title: Soybeans Fall as China Summit Leaves US Farmers Seeking Details
title_cn: 中国峰会让美国农民寻求细节，大豆价格下跌
summary: President Donald Trump’s trip to China offered little assurance to US farmers looking for concrete signs of a pickup in trade between the two countries.

title: Pound and Gilts Under Pressure Amid Starmer Uncertainty
title_cn: 斯塔默的不确定性使英镑和英国国债面临压力
summary: The British pound is heading for its worst week since 2024 against the US dollar and gilt yields surged as the pressure on UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer keeps building. Labour's Andy Burnham could try to get back to Westminster and make a run at Starmer. Bloomberg's Lizzy Burden has the latest from 10 Downing Street on "Bloomberg Brief." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India Seeks to Verify Details of Ship Attack in Gulf of Oman
title_cn: 印度寻求核实阿曼湾船只袭击的细节
summary: India is examining the circumstances of an attack on a cargo vessel that caught fire before sinking in the Gulf of Oman, according to officials familiar with the matter.

title: China Criticizes EU Over Improper Jurisdiction in Nuctech Probe
title_cn: 中国批评欧盟对同方威视调查管辖权不当
summary: China’s Ministry of Justice said the European Union’s use of its foreign subsidies regulation in a probe of Chinese security firm Nuctech Co. constitutes improper extraterritorial jurisdiction and barred compliance with the measures.

title: Communist Cuba Is Leaning on Capitalists After Oil Runs Out
title_cn: 石油耗尽后，共产主义古巴转向资本家
summary: Private businesses that emerged on the island despite years of persecution will be key to whatever comes next as Trump pushes to end 67 years of one-party rule.

title: Third GOP Megabill Could Slip Until After Elections, Moore Says
title_cn: 摩尔表示，共和党的第三张巨额账单可能会推迟到选举之后
summary: House Republicans will likely forfeit their chance to pass another partisan fiscal package ahead of the midterm elections if they don’t wrap up their work before the August recess, a member of that chamber’s leadership team said Friday.

title: Trump to Decide Soon on Taiwan Arms Sale, Noncommittal to Xi
title_cn: 特朗普将很快决定对台军售，但对习近平不置可否
summary: US President Donald Trump said he made no commitment to Chinese President Xi Jinping over Taiwan, and would make a decision soon over a planned $14 billion arms deal with the island.
